hooks: A promise from Allah to you
When you feel lost… read this
This is your sign to keep going
Read this when you feel overwhelmed
Read this and feel the peace
descriptions: This ayah is a gentle reminder.
A moment of calm from the Qur'an.
A reminder that and we ransomed him with a great sacrifice.
May these words soften your heart.
Your heart was meant to hear this.
A reminder that but they had not been sent as guardians over them.
A reminder that [it is but] a small enjoyment; then their [fina....
Feel the peace in these words.
Let this verse bring you peace.
A reminder that allah - there is no deity except him.
A verse to carry in your heart.
